summary: Implemented ProjectSettingsModalContent governance branch and USER_SERVICE-derived isAdmin wiring. The targeted CT spec was added but the desktop CT harness fails before running assertions because ProjectSettingsModalContent statically imports projectSettings/GeneralSettings.svelte, which imports RemoveProjectForm.svelte -> $app/navigation; apps/desktop/playwright-ct.config.ts does not resolve SvelteKit $app virtual modules.
